一分大发全天精准计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238994459_63908980<br>vk.com/topic-238994468_63636200<br>vk.com/topic-238994479_63909019<br>vk.com/topic-238994475_63027457<br>vk.com/topic-238994584_63112514<br>vk.com/topic-238864336_63465768<br>vk.com/topic-238994472_63727273<br>vk.com/topic-238994483_63330857<br>vk.com/topic-238864074_63112679<br>vk.com/topic-238897700_64214940<br>vk.com/topic-238994464_63112572<br>vk.com/topic-238994476_63465648<br>vk.com/topic-238855704_63112635<br>vk.com/topic-238994460_64214917<br>vk.com/topic-238994454_63112587<br>vk.com/topic-238994455_63027507<br>vk.com/topic-238981692_63727342<br>vk.com/topic-238994595_63027524<br>vk.com/topic-238994446_63465691<br>vk.com/topic-238897700_64215074<br>vk.com/topic-238989826_63465821<br>vk.com/topic-238864074_63112770<br>vk.com/topic-238994443_63330910<br>vk.com/topic-238864336_63465796<br>vk.com/topic-238994445_63027537<br>vk.com/topic-238994449_63909127<br>vk.com/topic-238939726_63465827<br>vk.com/topic-238994470_64214983<br>vk.com/topic-238965129_63909169<br>vk.com/topic-238951569_63909150<br>vk.com/topic-238951216_63465770<br>vk.com/topic-238938002_63727574<br>vk.com/topic-238994469_63909167<br>vk.com/to
